title: Checkout service p99 latency spike after deploy
description: Checkout API p99 latency rose from 200ms to 4s starting 14:00 UTC. ~12% of users seeing >3s response on /checkout. Error rate stable at <0.1%.
resolution: Rolled back deploy v2.4.1. Root cause: missing DB index on orders.user_id added in the deploy's new query path.

title: Payment webhook 5xx surge
description: Stripe webhook endpoint returning 502s for ~30% of requests over a 20-min window. Customer-facing impact: payment confirmations delayed.
resolution: Upstream load balancer health check was failing one of three pods. Restarted the pod, restored capacity. Added stricter readiness probe.

title: Auth service token validation failures
description: Users intermittently logged out across all services. JWT validation failing with 'signature verification failed'.
resolution: Key rotation script ran early due to cron misconfiguration. Old key removed before clients refreshed. Manual rollback to previous key, fixed cron.

title: Customer PII exposed in error logs
description: Error logs in Datadog contained full credit card numbers from a malformed payment request handler. Logs accessible to all engineers.
resolution: Purged affected log indices. Patched logger to redact card numbers. Filed regulatory notification per PCI process.

title: Search index out of sync
description: Product search returning results for items that no longer exist. ~3% of queries showing stale data 24h after delete.
resolution: Kafka consumer lag on the deletes topic; consumer pod OOM-killed and not restarted. Restarted pod, replayed delete events, increased memory limits.

title: Database connection pool exhaustion
description: User profile service throwing 'connection pool exhausted' errors. Login flow degraded; 8% of login attempts failing.
resolution: A new admin dashboard query was holding connections for 30+ seconds. Added query timeout, increased pool size as buffer, asked dashboard team to fix the slow query.

title: Failed deploy left old + new pods running
description: Rolling deploy of inventory-service got stuck halfway. 50% of pods on v1.8, 50% on v1.9. New schema column being read by v1.9 caused 5xx on requests routed to v1.8.
resolution: Force-rolled back all pods to v1.8. Identified that the schema migration shouldn't have shipped before backwards-compatible release. Updated deploy checklist.

title: Brute force login attempts from single IP
description: 100k+ failed logins against random usernames from a single IP in 10 min. WAF rate limit didn't trigger.
resolution: Manually blocked IP at WAF. Found rate limit rule was scoped to authenticated requests only. Added pre-auth rate limit rule.

title: Email service queue backed up
description: Transactional emails (password resets, order confirmations) delayed by ~45 min. Queue depth at 80k, normal is <100.
resolution: SES sending quota hit due to a marketing batch sent through the same account. Moved marketing to separate SES identity, raised transactional quota.

title: Duplicate orders created on retry
description: ~50 customers reported being charged twice. Order service's retry logic missing idempotency key on POST /orders.
resolution: Issued refunds for duplicates. Added idempotency key requirement to /orders endpoint. Backfilled key generation in client SDK.

title: TLS cert expired on api.company.com
description: Public API returning cert errors to all clients. Auto-renewal failed silently 30 days ago.
resolution: Manually renewed cert. Investigation: cert-manager service account lost permissions in a recent IAM cleanup. Restored permissions, added cert-expiry alerting at 14d.

title: S3 bucket misconfigured as public
description: User-uploaded receipt images bucket was public-read for 6 hours. ~12k images uploaded during window.
resolution: Made bucket private. Audited access logs; no enumeration patterns detected. Added Terraform policy to block public ACL on any new bucket.

title: Memory leak in recommendation worker
description: Recommendation worker pods OOM-killed every ~6 hours. Recommendations falling back to defaults during restarts.
resolution: Leak in caching library when TTL was set to 0 (interpreted as 'never expire'). Set explicit 1h TTL, upgraded library to version with the bug fix.

title: Kafka consumer group stuck
description: Analytics events not being consumed. Consumer group offset hadn't advanced in 2 hours. Dashboard data 2h stale.
resolution: Poison pill message in topic. Skipped the offset, root-caused the malformed event upstream, added schema validation at producer.

title: Mobile app crashloop on launch
description: iOS app v4.2.0 crashing on launch for 100% of users. Android unaffected. Released 30 min ago.
resolution: Force feature flag off via remote config. Crash was a nil-unwrap on a missing config key. Pulled v4.2.0 from App Store, shipped v4.2.1 with the fix.

title: Cache stampede on homepage
description: Homepage load times went from 200ms to 8s. CDN cache expired during a traffic spike, all requests hit origin simultaneously.
resolution: Manually warmed cache. Added cache key jitter and stale-while-revalidate to prevent simultaneous expiry.

title: Internal admin tool exposed externally
description: Admin dashboard reachable from public internet for 3 days due to a misconfigured ingress rule.
resolution: Updated ingress to require VPN. Audited access logs; only internal IPs hit it during the window. Added a network policy linter to CI.

title: Background job duplicate execution
description: Daily billing job ran twice, charging some customers double. Cron and Kubernetes CronJob both configured for the same task.
resolution: Issued refunds. Removed legacy cron entry. Added a distributed lock around the billing job as defence in depth.

title: Sudden Redis latency spike
description: Redis p99 latency went from 1ms to 200ms across the cluster. Affected most read paths.
resolution: Noisy neighbour: a new analytics service was running KEYS * across the production cluster. Moved it to a read replica, banned KEYS in production via a config rule.

title: Webhook replay attack
description: Inbound webhooks from a partner being replayed by an attacker. ~20k duplicate events processed.
resolution: Added HMAC signature verification with a 5-minute timestamp window. Deduped affected events from the past 24h.

title: Image upload service 502s
description: Image uploads failing with 502 for ~15% of requests. Backend showing healthy.
resolution: Nginx ingress had a 30s timeout but new image processing path was taking 35s for large files. Increased timeout, added async processing for files >5MB.

title: Reporting numbers off by 10x
description: Daily revenue dashboard showing 10x actual revenue for the past 3 days. Finance flagged the discrepancy.
resolution: ETL job had a join that fan-out duplicated rows after a schema change. Fixed the join, recomputed historical reports.

title: DDoS targeting login endpoint
description: Login endpoint hitting 50k req/sec, normal is 200/sec. Legitimate users seeing degraded login.
resolution: Enabled Cloudflare 'Under Attack' mode, rate limited by ASN. Coordinated with infra team for permanent rate limit rule.

title: Feature flag rollout broke account settings page
description: Account settings page showing 500 for users in the 25% rollout group of new settings UI flag.
resolution: Disabled the flag for everyone. Bug was a missing migration for a new user_preferences column. Shipped migration, re-enabled flag at 5%.

title: Slow query taking down read replicas
description: Two of three read replicas marked unhealthy. A new analytics dashboard query was running 15-min full table scans.
resolution: Killed the query. Added query timeout at the proxy. Asked the analytics team to use the dedicated analytics replica for ad-hoc queries.

title: Order export missing recent records
description: Daily order export to data warehouse missing the last 4 hours of orders for the past week.
resolution: Export was using server-local time but DB timestamps were UTC. Fixed timezone handling, backfilled the missing records.

title: API rate limiter blocking legitimate clients
description: Several enterprise customers reporting 429s on normal API usage. Rate limiter using IP-based limits, but customers are behind a corporate NAT.
resolution: Switched rate limit key from IP to API key. Backfilled per-customer limits based on contract tiers.

title: Secrets rotation broke service-to-service auth
description: After a routine vault secret rotation, several services lost ability to call each other. Cascading 500s across multiple services.
resolution: Rolled back the rotation. Found that several services hardcoded the old secret value in config rather than reading from vault. Audited and fixed.

title: Database failover took 12 minutes
description: Primary DB went down. Failover to replica took 12 min instead of expected 30 sec. Full outage during that window.
resolution: Replica was lagging due to a long-running transaction blocking replay. Killed the transaction, completed failover. Added monitoring on replication lag.

title: Canary deploy not catching regression
description: Bug shipped to 100% despite passing canary phase. Canary was getting near-zero traffic due to load balancer config drift.
resolution: Rolled back. Fixed canary traffic routing. Added a deploy-blocking check that verifies canary is actually receiving traffic before promoting.
